[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010000010 2
1 0100001001 3
2 0010010001 3
3 1000001001 3
4 0110000000 2
5 1111001111 8
6 0010000110 3
7 0000000110 2

23 0010000000 1

61 0000000000 a
72 1000001001 3 match 3
